testcase.name: test_ceo_login

failure.message:
AssertionError: CEO login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_iteration_77.py:27: in test_ceo_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"CEO login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: CEO login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_team_leader_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Team Leader login failed: Worker error: Network connection lost. assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_iteration_77.py:36: in test_team_leader_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Team Leader login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Team Leader login failed: Worker error: Network connection lost. E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

failure.message:
AssertionError: CS Head login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
